label: Prismcell Storeroom
description: Prismcell Storeroom serves as the secure back-of-house reserve for The Polarized Cask, sealed behind black-ceramic bulkheads that match Halo Quietus Port’s concourse plating. Stack-racks of polarized crates and vitrified glass kegs line the walls in disciplined rows, each shelf marked with charge-safe placards to prevent stray interference from the tavern’s threaded channels. A low, prismatic service lamp casts narrow bands of copper-white light that preserve the establishment’s hushlit aesthetic while keeping contents legible. Sound-damping ribs and overbuilt pressure latches maintain a near-anechoic quiet, isolating inventory from the concourse’s mechanical vibration and approach-line glare.
